title: rorippa aurea
intro: Rorippa aurea, also known as golden cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rorippa aurea are attributed to its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rorippa aurea include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Rorippa aurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in salads and as a garnish due to its mild, peppery flavor.
